headline: RBC Capital Assigns Outperform Rating to Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG)
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) is one of the 11 best insurance stocks to buy right now. On March 17, Rowland Mayor from RBC Capital assigned an Outperform rating to Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG). The analyst resumed coverage on the stock with a target price of $260, which yields an upside potential […]

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Arthur J. Gallagher, Lowers Price Target to $235
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Mark Hughes   maintains Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $271 to $235.
